name: Atlantic Regional
description_short: Atlantic Regional is a federally-insured credit union based in South Portland, ME. Member-owned and not-for-profit, it provides everyday banking, lending, and savings services to its membership.
description_long: Atlantic Regional is a federal credit union serving members in , , established in 1941. As a not-for-profit financial cooperative, credit unions typically offer lower loan rates, higher savings rates, and fewer fees than traditional banks. The credit union operates 12 branch locations. Deposits are federally insured up to $250,000 by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA).
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
cons: Membership requirements may apply (geographic, employer, or affiliation)
Fewer branches and ATMs than large banks
May have limited digital banking features
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Atlantic Regional — NCUA-insured credit union in South Portland, ME. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
